prompt: Here's my game on Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.HonStudios.LuminoriaTactics&hl=en — can you auto-draft a game marketing context doc from this listing? The game is in global launch now.

assertions.text: Game title is correctly identified as LUTA: Luminoria Tactics (or Luminoria Tactics)
Launch status is set to global launch
Genre reflects tactical/strategy positioning (not casual or hyper-casual)
IAP presence is noted (listing confirms in-app purchases available)
Flags missing data (KPI targets, UA channels, retention actuals) rather than fabricating them
